name: Lilycolor Co., Ltd.
summary: Lilycolor Co., Ltd. plans, develops, and sells interior products in Japan. It offers wallpapers, custom curtains, and floorings under the Lilycala brand name to interior specialty stores, department stores, daily carpentry stores, accessory stores, housing manufacturers, design offices, construction companies, etc. The company is also involved in the design, construction, and project management of facilities and office spaces, as well as undertakes renovation and construction contracts for lodging, medical, and commercial facilities. The company was formerly known as Kawakichi Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Lilycolor Co., Ltd. in 1989. Lilycolor Co., Ltd. was founded in 1907 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
